overall.description: A cinematic third-person view of a medieval woman washing laundry by a river in a video game. The camera slowly orbits around the character as she scrubs clothes on a washboard beside a wooden dock, with a wicker basket of linens nearby.

events.description: character reaches into river water to rinse clothes

agents.ego_description: camera orbits slowly counter-clockwise around the washing woman, maintaining focus on her actions from a rear-side angle

notable_agents.action: scrubbing clothes on a washboard and periodically rinsing them in the flowing river

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a small dock extending over the river
large woven wicker basket filled with white linens and clothes
flowing brown river water with visible submerged rocks and gentle current
wooden washboard used by the character for scrubbing clothes
stack of cut firewood and logs piled on the riverbank behind the dock

segments.scene_description: The camera circles slowly around a woman washing laundry on a rustic wooden dock. A wicker basket of white clothes sits prominently in the left foreground while the character scrubs garments on a washboard, occasionally dipping them into the flowing river water to her right.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside wooden washing platform with grassy bank

events.description: character turns to face the camera while continuing the washing motion

agents.ego_description: camera continues orbiting to capture a frontal three-quarter view of the woman as she works

notable_agents.action: vigorously scrubbing clothes on the washboard and rinsing them, occasionally looking up toward the camera

entered.detail: grassy slope with scattered trees rising up from the riverbank

segments.scene_description: As the camera completes its orbit to the front, the woman's face becomes visible as she continues the rhythmic washing motion. The basket of laundry shifts toward the middle-left of the frame while the grassy riverbank comes into view behind her, replacing the wood pile seen earlier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, orbiting camera movement that shifts from a side profile of a woman washing laundry to a full frontal view of her at work. It begins by circling around the woman on a rustic wooden dock, where a wicker basket of white clothes sits in the left foreground as she scrubs garments on a washboard and dips them into the flowing river. As the camera continues its arc toward the front, the woman's face is revealed while she maintains her rhythmic washing motion. The perspective then shifts the laundry basket toward the middle-left of the frame, replacing the initial view of a wood pile with the lush, grassy riverbank unfolding behind her.
